description: Shared pre-commit → pre-push → PR gate ladder for web + iOS (JOV-3210). Adapters map to husky hooks and GitHub Actions; do not fork intent per app.

rungs.name: Conflict markers
rungs.intent: Block unresolved merge conflict markers from being committed.

rungs.name: Secret scan (gitleaks + trufflehog)
rungs.intent: Block staged secrets before they hit a public remote.

rungs.name: Format + lint (Biome / ESLint / SwiftLint)
rungs.intent: Deterministic style and server-boundary checks on changed files.

preCommit.ios: pnpm run ios:lint (best-practices) + SwiftFormat/SwiftLint when available

rungs.name: Typecheck (tsc strict / affected)
rungs.intent: Fail closed on TypeScript errors before push/merge.

rungs.name: Affected unit tests
rungs.intent: Run focused unit tests before merge; full suite on main.

prePush.ios: pnpm run ios:test (when exercising native changes)

rungs.name: PR size limit
rungs.intent: Keep PRs reviewable (800 lines / 40 files; big-pr for codemods).

rungs.name: Dependency vulnerability scan
rungs.intent: Surface known vulnerable deps on the PR/security path.

pr.web: security.yml / CodeQL / Trivy (post-merge heavy; PR secret scans hard-block)

rungs.name: PR Ready aggregate
rungs.intent: Single required check so red PRs cannot merge.

web.notes: Husky + lint-staged is the local adapter. Lefthook is not required while husky covers the same rungs.

ios.prePushHook: pnpm run ios:lint via scripts/hooks when Swift files staged
ios.notes: SwiftFormat/SwiftLint run in ios-ci; local best-practices lint is scripts/ios-best-practices-lint.sh.
